explanations.2: This is a special comment telling the spell-checker to ignore the word 'tinytex' so it doesn't flag it as a misspelling.
explanations.12: These are default user ID and group ID numbers (like permissions identifiers in Linux), but VS Code will override them with your actual system values when the container starts.
explanations.28: The 'cached' option is a performance hint for Docker on Mac/Windows to cache file reads, making the shared folder faster.
explanations.39: This command keeps the container running indefinitely by repeatedly sleeping, so the dev environment stays alive even when you're not actively running code.
